author: mika-dev
description: Import Word files easily. Adds a preview mode for .docx files and the ability to convert them to markdown (.md) files.

manifest.description: Import Word files easily. Adds a preview mode for .docx files and the ability to convert them to markdown (.md) files.

releases.description:

- Complete rewrite for consistency with Advanced Canvas (My other plugin)
- Massively improved image imports
- Added support for importing comments (#4)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Developer-Mike/obsidian-docxer/compare/1.0.3...2.0.0
